objects.name: Analytic 1716
objects.description: An application performs explicit cryptographic operations (e.g., symmetric/asymmetric encryption routines) on locally collected or generated data, followed by structured outbound network communication that does not align with expected application behavior, particularly when occurring in the background or without user interaction. Detection correlates crypto API usage + data staging + application state + network transmission patterns.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: App invokes cryptographic functions (e.g., AES/RSA/KeyStore usage) on buffer data followed by encode/transform operations not tied to normal app workflows

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: App writes encoded/encrypted blobs (high entropy data) to local storage or memory buffers prior to transmission

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Crypto + data staging occurs while app_state=background OR device_locked=true OR no recent user interaction

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: App not in enterprise-approved list performing network + crypto behavior inconsistent with declared functionality

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Time correlation between crypto operation and outbound network transmission
Threshold for detecting encoded/encrypted payloads based on entropy scoring
Apps expected to perform encryption (e.g., VPNs, messaging apps)
Whether encryption + transmission should only occur during user interaction
Expected jitter/interval for legitimate app traffic vs beaconing patterns
